commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: An ephod, or the ephod. That is, the vestment of the high priest, with the Urim and Thummim, by which the Lord gave his oracles.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: An ephod: Or the ephod. That is, the vestment of the high priest, with the urim and thummim, by which the Lord gave his oracle.
